connectivity_tips.tip: Etisalat and Du are both widely used networks. Prepaid SIM cards are available for AED 50-100 depending on the plan and can be picked up at the airport.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai and Abu Dhabi- All Inclusive Guide_Rituraj.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: DU's packages are slightly cheaper than Etisalat's. Most people in Dubai use Du sim cards.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai and Abu Dhabi- All Inclusive Guide_Rituraj.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Etisalat's 4G coverage is very good and available in every city and region. DU's 5G coverage is better than Etisalat's, but its 5G speed is slightly slower.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai and Abu Dhabi- All Inclusive Guide_Rituraj.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Etisalat and Du are both widely used networks. Prepaid SIM cards are available for AED 50-100 depending on the plan and can be picked up at the airport.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Abu Dhabi and Dubai- All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: DU's packages are slightly cheaper than Etisalat's. Most people in Dubai use Du sim cards.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Abu Dhabi and Dubai- All Inclusive Guide.pdf

connectivity_tips.tip: Etisalat's 4G coverage is very good and available in every city and region. DU's 5G coverage is better than Etisalat's, but its 5G speed is slightly slower.
connectivity_tips._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Abu Dhabi and Dubai- All Inclusive Guide.pdf

transport_options.description: Can hire a taxi for the day (10 hrs)
transport_options._source_file: Dubai and Abu Dhabi - UAE/Dubai and Abu Dhabi- All Inclusive Guide_Rituraj.pdf

transport_options.description: Generally more expensive but offers flat rate, could be more affordable during peak hours and longer distances

transport_options.description: Can hire a taxi for the day (10 hrs)
